channel.title: SEAtoday - Food & Drink
channel.description: Upcoming events for SEAtoday - Food & Drink

item.title: March Madness Watch Party at Five Iron Golf - Seattle Capitol Hill
item.description:
Monday, March 23, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Five Iron Golf - Seattle Capitol Hill, 1525 11th Ave Suite 100, Seattle, WA

Five Iron Golf is your College Basketball HQ this March! Gather your crew and book 1–2 simulator bays for up to 12 people \(6 people per bay\) for a bracket-busting watch party experience. Enjoy all-day TV coverage of college basketball alongside cutting-edge golf and multisport simulators, a locally-inspired menu, and custom beverage packages. Book your watch party for March 19 or 20 and you'll automatically be entered to win a 20-person happy hour with drinks and appetizers — a $1,000 value! Group packages can include reserved event space, team-specific décor, a dedicated staff member, full-screen and/or picture-in-picture viewing, a customizable menu, beverage packages, free club rentals, multisport simulators, and table games. Select the "Small Event" option at booking to ensure simulator bays are placed side-by-side. Availability of select features varies by location. Promotions: Happy Hour – "It's 5i o'Clock Somewhere" \(Monday–Friday, 3–6 PM\) Enjoy $5 bottomless boneless wings, $10 bottomless bone-in wings, $5 select beers/cans/cocktails, $5 dips \(guacamole, hot honey ricotta, hummus\), half-off pizzas, and $5 featured shots. Dine-in only at participating locations; simulator rental may be required. 5i After Dark – "Swing In, For Less"  \(Sunday–Thursday 9 PM to close | Friday–Saturday 10 PM to close\) Features $29/hr simulator rentals plus the same great food and drink specials as Happy Hour, with wings priced per dozen rather than bottomless. Dine-in only at participating locations; simulator rental may be required.

Event details

item.title: Sushi board with Shaper Basic Class
item.description:
Monday, March 23, 2026 at 1:30 PM

Location: Rockler Woodworking and Hardware, 832 NE Northgate Way, Seattle, WA

Sushi board with Shaper Basic Class

Event details

item.title: Tractor Tavern Square Dance w/ Atlas String Band
item.description:
Monday, March 23, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Tractor Tavern, 5213 Ballard Ave NW, Seattle, WA

Traditional Square Dance night with an instructor who teaches you how to swing your partner to and fro. All skill levels welcome! No partner required!

Event details

item.title: Crafty Night at TIM's!
item.description:
Monday, March 23, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Tim's Tavern, 602 North 105th Street, Seattle, WA

Crafty Night at Tim’s Tavern Monday, March 9th & 23rd • 6–9 PM Bring your yarn, your needles, your sketchbook, painting, or whatever project you’ve been “meaning to get back to” and come hang out with other crafty humans in a low-pressure, come-as-you-are space. No agenda, no workshop, no rules. Just a cozy Monday night to stitch, knit, crochet, embroider, sketch, glue-gun, bead, or quietly curse at your current work-in-progress alongside folks who get it. All skill levels welcome. Grab a drink, grab a seat, and make something. We have a full kitchen with omnivore and vegan menus plus gluten-free options, and a robust cocktail/bar list \(21 w/ID\) as well as plenty of NA options. The venue is all ages until 10pm. Seating is first-come, first serve. Monday special: enjoy 15% off the vegan menu!

Event details

item.title: March Madness Watch Party at Five Iron Golf - Seattle Capitol Hill
item.description:
Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Five Iron Golf - Seattle Capitol Hill, 1525 11th Ave Suite 100, Seattle, WA

Five Iron Golf is your College Basketball HQ this March! Gather your crew and book 1–2 simulator bays for up to 12 people \(6 people per bay\) for a bracket-busting watch party experience. Dine-in only at participating locations; simulator rental may be required.

item.title: TAF Varsity Luncheon 2026: Courage to Act
item.description:
Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Amazon Meeting Center (SEA45), 2031 7th Avenue, Seattle, WA

Join us on March 24, 2026 for this one-of-a-kind fundraising event!

Event details

item.title: Hyper-Local Happy Hour (Non-alcoholic)
item.description:
Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Calvary: The Hill, 1107 E Howell St, Seattle, WA

Get to know your hyper-local Capitol Hill neighbors around Cal Anderson Park in an open house style, non-alcoholic happy hour!  Enjoy non-alcoholic beers and yummy mocktails, along with a charcuterie spread, all inside a 120-year-old historic Capitol Hill church building. These happy hours will be from 4-5:30pm every 4th Tuesday through June  January 27th February 24th March 24th April 28th May 26th June 23rd \*Please note that ADA access is available into the happy hour area, but not to the restrooms unfortunately \(very old building!\)

Event details

item.title: March Madness Watch Party at Five Iron Golf - Seattle Capitol Hill
item.description:
Wednesday, March 25, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Five Iron Golf - Seattle Capitol Hill, 1525 11th Ave Suite 100, Seattle, WA

item.title: Spring in Full Bloom! A Brunch Celebration
item.description:
Wednesday, March 25, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: University House Issaquah, 22975 SE Black Nugget Rd, Issaquah, WA

Join us for a delightful Spring Brunch as we celebrate the arrival of the season at University House Issaquah. Enjoy a relaxed gathering featuring a full brunch buffet, festive mimosas, and the fresh energy of spring. It’s the perfect opportunity to savor great food, connect with friends, and experience the welcoming atmosphere of our community. We hope you’ll join us for this cheerful celebration of new beginnings.

Event details

item.title: HAPPY HOUR
item.description:
Wednesday, March 25, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Description FREE Event for Lynnwood Chamber Members & their Guests - please register in advance.

Event details

item.title: Women's Month Luncheon
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 11:30 AM

Location: Regency Newcastle, 7454 Newcastle Golf Club Rd, Newcastle, WA

Event details

item.title: Mariners Opening Day Beer Release with Fast Fashion
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Chuck's Hop Shop Greenwood, 656 NW 85th St, Seattle, WA

Join us to celebrate the start of the Mariners season! We often visit Fast Fashion on game days, so it only made sense to brew up a beer to kick off another wonderful season! In addition to our West Coast IPA collab Heaven Sent, we'll have two other collabs on tap that Fast Fashion brewed with Structures and Formula!

Event details

item.title: LaShellé Wines Pop-Up
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: WeRise Wine Bar, 1913 2nd AVE, Seattle, WA

Wine Tasting & Meet the Winemaker

Event details

item.title: FREE OFFICE AND COFFEE FRIDAYS!
item.description:
Friday, March 27, 2026 at 8:30 AM

Location: Spaces- Stadium, 450 Alaskan Way South #Suite 200, Seattle, WA

Join us for the day and treat yourself to one of our cozy, furnished office spaces. The coffee's on us!

Event details

item.title: Best of CID Food Tour
item.description:
Friday, March 27, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Wing Luke Museum, 719 S. King Street, Seattle, WA

Best of CID Food Tour Friday, March 27 | 4:00PM-6:30PM General admission to the Museum is included with your tour ticket.

Event details

item.title: Live Music Happy Hour Joe Casalini Trio
item.description:
Friday, March 27, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: The Royal Room, 5000 Rainier Ave South, Seattle, WA

Join us for Live Music Happy Hour with the Joe Casalini Trio. The Casalini Trio has played happy hours at the Royal Room since 2019. They play laid-back, swinging versions of great tunes by Duke Ellington, Billy Strayhorn, Hoagie Carmichael, Phillip Johnston, and other great American songwriters of the last 100 years. The happy hour usually lasts about an hour and a half. Good drinks, good people, good ambience, and there’s never a cover charge, although the band often encourages donations to local food banks and other worthy causes.

Event details

item.title: Get With It Auto Club Cars and Coffee
item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 9 AM

Location: Mercurys Coffee Co., Northeast 20th Street, Bellevue, WA

getwithitautoclub cars and coffeecome meet some of our members and lets talk cars and have coffee and one of the top coffee shops and bakery.

Event details

item.title: Making Local Markets
item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 10 AM

Making Local Markets Downtown Bothell comes alive with creativity and community at the Making Local Markets on Saturday, March 28, 2026, from 10 AM to 4 PM. This vibrant outdoor market showcases 100\+ small, local, handmade businesses, plus an array of delicious food trucks. Stroll through the bustling streets, discover unique finds, and soak in the lively atmosphere. With pet-friendly vibes, free parking at City Hall, and plenty of great bars and restaurants nearby, it's the perfect way to spend a spring Saturday. Don't miss this celebration of local craftsmanship in the heart of Bothell!

Event details

item.title: March Madness Watch Party at Five Iron Golf - Seattle Capitol Hill
item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Five Iron Golf - Seattle Capitol Hill, 1525 11th Ave Suite 100, Seattle, WA

Five Iron Golf is your College Basketball HQ this March! Gather your crew and book 1–2 simulator bays for up to 12 people \(6 people per bay\) for a bracket-busting watch party experience. Enjoy all-day TV coverage of college basketball alongside cutting-edge golf and multisport simulators, a locally-inspired menu, and custom beverage packages. Book your watch party for March 19 or 20 and you'll automatically be entered to win a 20-person happy hour with drinks and appetizers — a $1,000 value! Group packages can include reserved event space, team-specific décor, a dedicated staff member, full-screen and/or picture-in-picture viewing, a customizable menu, beverage packages, free club rentals, multisport simulators, and table games. Select the "Small Event" option at booking to ensure simulator bays are placed side-by-side. Availability of select features varies by location. Promotions: Happy Hour – "It's 5i o'Clock Somewhere" \(Monday–Friday, 3–6 PM\) Enjoy $5 bottomless boneless wings, $10 bottomless bone-in wings, $5 select beers/cans/cocktails, $5 dips \(guacamole, hot honey ricotta, hummus\), half-off pizzas, and $5 featured shots. Dine-in only at participating locations; simulator rental may be required. 5i After Dark – "Swing In, For Less"  \(Sunday–Thursday 9 PM to close | Friday–Saturday 10 PM to close\) Features $29/hr simulator rentals plus the same great food and drink specials as Happy Hour, with wings priced per dozen rather than bottomless. Dine-in only at participating locations; simulator rental may be required.

Event details

item.title: PCC Cooking Class - Savory Sichuan
item.description:
Sunday, March 29, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Columbia City PCC, 3610 S Edmunds St, Seattle, WA

Learn to make traditional Chinese dishes at home! In this cooking class, you’ll pick up techniques and tips for capturing the flavors of Sichuan cuisine. Get practice infusing oil with chilis and hand-grinding spices for a sauce as you create deeply flavorful dan dan noodles. You’ll also try your hand at methodically rolling and flattening dough with scallions for savory pancakes, which you’ll pair with a scratch-made dipping sauce. By the end of class, you’ll be ready to recreate the entire menu in your kitchen.  Contains pork and dairy.  About the instructor: Our seasoned instructors and chefs have been chosen to be a part of PCC Cooks because of their culinary expertise and sincere enthusiasm and talent for teaching.  This is a hands-on format class for adults.  This cooking class is available at multiple PCC locations and dates. See below for details: Bellevue PCC -Friday, March 27, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  -Sunday, March 29, 10:00 - 12:00 pm  -Friday, April 3, 10:00 - 12:00 pm  Bothell PCC -Friday, March 27, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  -Sunday, March 29, 10:00 - 12:00 pm  Burien PCC -Sunday, March 29, 10:00 - 12:00 pm  Columbia City PCC -Sunday, March 29, 10:00 - 12:00 pm  Edmonds PCC -Friday, March 27, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  -Sunday, March 29, 10:00 - 12:00 pm  Green Lake Village PCC -Friday, March 27, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  -Sunday, March 29, 10:00 - 12:00 pm

Event details

item.title: Paint & Sip at Post Pike Georgetown
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Post Pike Georgetown, 5701 Airport Way South, Seattle, WA

Come enjoy some drinks and pizza while painting step-by-step with me.

Event details

item.title: Drink & Draw at a/stir
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: a/stir, 818 E Pike St, Seattle, WA

Sip, sketch, and let the creativity flow at our lively Drink & Draw! With a live model and all art supplies provided, all you have to do is show up, grab a drink, and dive in. Expect great energy and a fun, no-pressure space to create, connect, and enjoy the vibe—no experience needed.

Event details

item.title: Tokyo Tea Room
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Barboza, 925 E. Pike Street, Seattle, WA

Event details

item.title: FloorWERK with Ruby with Ruby Mimosa
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Whim W'Him Contemporary Dance Center, 1716 2nd Avenue North, Seattle, WA

Find your inner diva on the floor with this sultry and sickening floor work class. You’ll have the audience gagged while screaming WEEEEERK!

Event details

Dine-in only at participating locations; simulator rental may be required.

Event details

item.title: Eric-Paul Riege at Burke Artist Studio
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Henry Art Gallery, 15th Ave NE & 41st St, Seattle, WA

To celebrate the opening weekend of Eric-Paul Riege: ojo|-|ólǫ́, visit the artist offsite at the Burke Artist Studio, located in the Northwest Native Art Gallery at the Burke Museum, just a few blocks from the Henry. As part of Free First Thursday at the Burke, visitors will have the chance to watch the artist at work and speak with Riege about his process. ojo|-|ólǫ́ is based on Eric-Paul Riege's material research and engagement with the Navajo collections held by the Burke Museum, as well as the Brown University's Haffenreffer Museum of Anthropology. The resulting new body of work is informed by ancestral knowledge and traditions contained within Indigenous objects, and which aims, in part, to redress practices of cultural dispossession by museums and other institutions. Bio Eric-Paul Riege \(Diné\) is a weaver and fiber artist working in collage, durational performance, installation, woven sculpture, and wearable art. Using weaving as both means and metaphor to tell hybrid tales that interlace stories from Diné spirituality with his own interpretations and cosmology, he understands his artworks as animate and mobile. His practice pays homage and links him to generations of weavers in his family who aid him in generating spaces of sanctuary. Riege's recent solo exhibitions include iiZiiT \[3\]: RIEGE Jewelry \+ Supply at Canal Projects, New York \(2025\), Hammer Projects: Eric Paul Riege at the Hammer Museum, Los Angeles \(2022-2023\), and Hól ́ǫ-it xistz at the Institute of Contemporary Art Miami \(2019\). His recent group exhibitions include the 24th Biennale of Sydney in Australia \(2024\), Indian Theater: Native Performance, Art, and Self-Determination \(2023\), Prospect.5 Triennial in New Orleans \(2022\), and the Toronto Biennial of Art \(2022\). He holds a BFA in Art Studio and Ecology from the University of New Mexico in Albuquerque. His work is collected by Forge Project and ICA Miami, among others. He is represented by Bockley Gallery \(MN\) and STARS Gallery \(CA\). Riege is a member of the Charcoal Streaked Division of the Red Running Into the Water clan. He was born and is based in Na'nízhoozhí \[Gallup, New Mexico\].

Event details

item.title: Membership Luncheon: Legislative Wrap
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Green River College - Kent Campus, 417 Ramsay Way, Suite 112, Room 282/283, Kent, WA

Description This luncheon focuses on discussing Kent's major development projects, growth corridors, and business attraction strategies. Attendees will connect with peers, engage with speakers, and gain insights for business growth

Event details

item.title: FREE OFFICE AND COFFEE FRIDAYS!
item.description:
Friday, April 3, 2026 at 8:30 AM

Location: Spaces- Stadium, 450 Alaskan Way South #Suite 200, Seattle, WA

Join us for the day and treat yourself to one of our cozy, furnished office spaces. The coffee's on us!

Event details

item.title: March Madness Watch Party at Five Iron Golf - Seattle Capitol Hill
item.description:
Friday, April 3, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Five Iron Golf - Seattle Capitol Hill, 1525 11th Ave Suite 100, Seattle, WA

Five Iron Golf is your College Basketball HQ this March! Gather your crew and book 1–2 simulator bays for up to 12 people \(6 people per bay\) for a bracket-busting watch party experience. Enjoy all-day TV coverage of college basketball alongside cutting-edge golf and multisport simulators, a locally-inspired menu, and custom beverage packages. Book your watch party for March 19 or 20 and you'll automatically be entered to win a 20-person happy hour with drinks and appetizers — a $1,000 value! Group packages can include reserved event space, team-specific décor, a dedicated staff member, full-screen and/or picture-in-picture viewing, a customizable menu, beverage packages, free club rentals, multisport simulators, and table games. Select the "Small Event" option at booking to ensure simulator bays are placed side-by-side. Availability of select features varies by location. Promotions: Happy Hour – "It's 5i o'Clock Somewhere" \(Monday–Friday, 3–6 PM\) Enjoy $5 bottomless boneless wings, $10 bottomless bone-in wings, $5 select beers/cans/cocktails, $5 dips \(guacamole, hot honey ricotta, hummus\), half-off pizzas, and $5 featured shots. Dine-in only at participating locations; simulator rental may be required. 5i After Dark – "Swing In, For Less"  \(Sunday–Thursday 9 PM to close | Friday–Saturday 10 PM to close\) Features $29/hr simulator rentals plus the same great food and drink specials as Happy Hour, with wings priced per dozen rather than bottomless. Dine-in only at participating locations; simulator rental may be required.

Event details

item.title: Best of CID Food Tour
item.description:
Friday, April 3, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Wing Luke Museum, 719 S. King Street, Seattle, WA

Best of CID Food Tour Friday, April 3 | 4:00PM-6:30PM General admission to the Museum is included with your tour ticket.

Event details

item.title: PCC Cooking Class - Date Night: Northwest Feast
item.description:
Friday, April 3, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Edmonds PCC, 9803 Edmonds Way, Edmonds, WA

Celebrate the flavors of our region alongside a partner in this date night cooking class. With our experts as your guide, you’ll learn to oven-roast king salmon so it’s perfectly flaky, and practice carefully reducing a cream sauce. For a side, you’ll try your hand at a multi-step process for turning out smashed potatoes with crispy golden edges. And for dessert, you’ll learn to gently heat ingredients for a panna cotta without scalding. You’ll leave class ready to recreate this Northwest-inspired menu at home.  Contains seafood and dairy.  About the instructor: Our seasoned instructors and chefs have been chosen to be a part of PCC Cooks because of their culinary expertise and sincere enthusiasm and talent for teaching.  This is a hands-on format class for adults.  This cooking class is available at multiple PCC locations and dates. See below for details:  Bellevue PCC -Friday, April 3, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  -Saturday, April 4, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  -Friday, May 1, 6:00 - 8:00 pm   Bothell PCC -Friday, April 3, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  -Friday, May 1, 6:00 - 8:00 pm   Burien PCC -Friday, April 3, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  -Friday, May 1, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  Columbia City PCC -Friday, April 3, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  -Saturday, April 4, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  Edmonds PCC -Friday, April 3, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  -Friday, May 1, 6:00 - 8:00 pm   Green Lake Village PCC -Friday, April 3, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  -Saturday, April 4, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  -Saturday, April 25, 6:00 - 8:00 pm  -Friday, May 1, 6:00 - 8:00 pm

Event details

item.title: March Madness Watch Party at Five Iron Golf - Seattle Capitol Hill
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Five Iron Golf - Seattle Capitol Hill, 1525 11th Ave Suite 100, Seattle, WA

Five Iron Golf is your College Basketball HQ this March! Gather your crew and book 1–2 simulator bays for up to 12 people \(6 people per bay\) for a bracket-busting watch party experience. Enjoy all-day TV coverage of college basketball alongside cutting-edge golf and multisport simulators, a locally-inspired menu, and custom beverage packages. Book your watch party for March 19 or 20 and you'll automatically be entered to win a 20-person happy hour with drinks and appetizers — a $1,000 value! Group packages can include reserved event space, team-specific décor, a dedicated staff member, full-screen and/or picture-in-picture viewing, a customizable menu, beverage packages, free club rentals, multisport simulators, and table games. Select the "Small Event" option at booking to ensure simulator bays are placed side-by-side. Availability of select features varies by location. Promotions: Happy Hour – "It's 5i o'Clock Somewhere" \(Monday–Friday, 3–6 PM\) Enjoy $5 bottomless boneless wings, $10 bottomless bone-in wings, $5 select beers/cans/cocktails, $5 dips \(guacamole, hot honey ricotta, hummus\), half-off pizzas, and $5 featured shots. Dine-in only at participating locations; simulator rental may be required. 5i After Dark – "Swing In, For Less"  \(Sunday–Thursday 9 PM to close | Friday–Saturday 10 PM to close\) Features $29/hr simulator rentals plus the same great food and drink specials as Happy Hour, with wings priced per dozen rather than bottomless. Dine-in only at participating locations; simulator rental may be required.

Event details

item.title: Cascade Centennial Chapter, SAR Monthly Meeting
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Enzo's Bistro & Bar, 120 NW Gilman Blvd, Issaquah, WA

Serving east king county The Cascade Centennial Chapter is located in the Bellevue area \(Seattle Eastside\) and has approximately 100 members. We meet at Enzo's Bistro in Issaquah on the first Saturday of the month except for July, August, and September when we break for the summer. Our meetings begin at 11am and end at 1pm, and consist of opening ceremonies, new member inductions and member awards, lunch \(order from menu\) and camaraderie, a program pertaining to American Revolution history, chapter business, and our closing ceremony. Our flagship event is our annual Veterans Day Ceremony which has evolved into one of the largest in the State. We welcome visitors, and hope you'll join us! RSVP: https://www.washingtonsar.org/chapters/cascade-centennial/ For more information: https://www.wassarccc.org

Event details

item.title: Seattle Sing-Along Brunch
item.description:
Sunday, April 5, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Admiral Pub, 2306 California Avenue Southwest, Seattle, WA

Brunch, Mimosas and Sing-along to the greatest pop hits of all time. Tickets include Brunch Buffet & party swag like inflatable Microphones!

Event details

item.title: Kiana Easter Brunch & Egg Hunt
item.description:
Sunday, April 5, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Kiana Lodge, 14976 Sandy Hook Rd NE, Poulsbo, WA

Kiana Lodge Easter Buffet & Egg Hunt Sun April 5th, 2026 Brunch Buffet 11:00AM - 02:00PM,Easter Bunny & Egg Hunt 12:00PM Come visit with the Easter bunny and enjoy a tasty Easter brunch at Kiana Lodge. Kids are encouraged to bring their own basket so they can find the hidden eggs filled with goodies! Adults: $54.60, Children 5-12: $21.84, 5 and Under: $5.46 Beverages: Cash Bar with Mimosa & Bloody Mary Specials Highchairs available in limited quantity please email info@kianalodge.com to reserve. All Children must be accompanied by an adult, please provide your own basket for the egg hunt. Menu: Fresh Sliced Seasonal Fruit Assorted Breakfast Pastries Scrambled Eggs Crisp Bacon Savory Sausage Links Sliced Glazed Ham Cedar Ridge Potatoes Spam Fried Rice Croissant French Toast Mixed Green Salad with balsamic dressing Kiana Signature Salmon Chef Carved Prime Rib with Creamy Horseradish & Au Jus Teriyaki Chicken Steamed Rice Seasonal Roasted Vegetables Omelet Station Dessert Buffet

Event details

item.title: Mimosas Cabaret ft. Death Becomes They/Them
item.description:
Sunday, April 5, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: The Mountain Room: Bar at the R, 3100 Airport Way South, Seattle, WA

Mimosas Cabaret serves up a fierce drag and burlesque brunch, at The Mountain Room, featuring "Death Becomes They/Them", a parody mini-musical packed with camp, glamour, and laughs. Sip cocktails while the stunning cast of Mimosas Cabaret deliver high energy performances inspired by the cult classic! Equal parts fabulous and unhinged, this brunch is your excuse to drink early, tip generously, and live forever! Siempre Viva!

Event details

item.description:
Sunday, April 5, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Julia's on Broadway, 300 Broadway E, Seattle, WA

Tickets: https://www.juliasonbroadway.com/shows-at-le-faux-playhouse.html Doors: 12pm | Show: 1pm
